name: Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the bacon and ground beef in a large skillet until cooked through.
2. Drain excess fat and set aside.
3. Chop celery, onion, and bell peppers into bite-sized pieces.
4. Cut cabbage into small pieces and boil for 5-7 minutes or until tender. Drain well.
5. Layer the ingredients: bacon, ground beef, chopped vegetables (onion, celery, bell pepper), cabbage, and rice in a large bowl.
6. Add soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to taste.
7. Pour the Ro-Tel tomatoes with juice and water over the layered mixture until just covered.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally, or pressure cook for approximately 25 minutes.
